programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Bread

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: American Disgrace

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Producer's Backend
programme.desc: Amaro reports to the scene of a car crash where a Hollywood starlet tries to flirt her way out of an arrest. Amaro tries to investigate the starlet for statutory rape, but Benson believes there is an underlying issue.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Holden's Manifesto

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pornstar's Requiem
programme.desc: Evie Barnes answers a modelling ad hoping to make some cash for tuition, but the job quickly spirals into online pornography. When her classmates discover her double life, they cross the line between fiction and reality.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Glasgowman's Wrath

programme.desc: When his request to install a doorknocker is denied, Frasier challenges the condo association president, Ms. Langer, by running against her in the election.

programme.title: Frasier: Death and the Dog

programme.title: Frasier: Four for the Seesaw

programme.title: Frasier: To Kill a Talking Bird

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Krantz and Gouldenstein Are Dead

programme.title: Frasier: The Unnatural
programme.desc: Upon learning that the radio station's softball team is short one player, Frasier's son, Frederick, insists his dad should fill in. Not wanting to let his son down, Frasier asks Martin to help him learn how to play.

programme.title: Reba: All Fore One

programme.title: Reba: Hello, I Must Be Going

programme.title: Reba: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean clash over who is going to host the Thanksgiving dinner this year.

programme.title: Reba: No Boys Upstairs
programme.desc: Reba rethinks her decision to allow Kyra to spend time alone with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Reba: Diamond Jim Brady
programme.desc: When Van suffers a severe knee injury, the team awards him with a huge settlement.

programme.title: Reba: Reba and the Nanny
programme.desc: Reba learns that Van has hired a nanny so he can spend more time goofing off.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All That Jazz

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebb Tide

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Reba: Date of Mirth

programme.title: Reba: Reba the Realtor
programme.desc: Brock reluctantly agrees to let Reba handle the sale of his precious condo.

programme.title: Reba: Flowers for Van

programme.title: Reba: Who Killed Brock

programme.title: Movie: Love's Complicated

programme.title: The Office: Here Comes Treble

programme.title: The Office: The Boat

programme.title: The Office: The Whale

programme.desc: When Mayor Goodway and the twins are late getting back from a snowshoeing, Jake and Everest call the PAW Patrol to search for them.When water in the duck pond mysteriously drains out, it's up to the PAW Patrol to find out what's happening.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups and the Big Twin Trick/ Pups Save the Mega Mayor
programme.desc: The Ladybird is up to her old tricks again, but this time the Mighty Twins have a super trick of their own. Mayor Humdinger finally gets super powers, and it's a total cat-astrophe.

programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Porous Pockets/ Choir Boys
programme.desc: Patrick finds himself alone when SpongeBob becomes the richest citizen in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum/ Stormy Weather
programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mind the Gap/ Dirty Bubble Returns

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Nerves of Steel
programme.desc: A whiteout pile-up scatters heavy I-beams across the highway, testing James and his crew; Kevin must lift a 20,000-pound chunk of steel off the road. Herb's crew stares down a huge mess and a marathon recovery in tough condition.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: My Way or the Highway
programme.desc: During a spring store, Steve cleans up a fuel spill blocking the 400, while Sonny struggles to keep the alternate route moving; John Allen recovers a loaded semi that went for a wild airborne ride.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Worlds Apart
programme.desc: Members of the 'Highway Thru Hell' crew join the 401 crew to weigh in on the unique challenges of recovery operations in Ontario and B.C., comparing the biggest wrecks and toughest jobs over the past winter.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers: Wood or Won't
programme.desc: With the last mill shutting down, Craig shifts into overdrive. The late season push hits hard on the crew and the equipment. As breakdowns add up, star driver Taylor hits his breaking point, forcing a stand-off with the boss.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers: Break Up
programme.desc: The LeBeau brothers' fleet battles muddy, sinking roads to get the last logs down the mountain. On a steep cutblock, Craig rolls a 'buncher' for the first time, sending his crew scrambling to get him out of the smoky machine.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Jellyfish
programme.desc: Looking at the possibilities of surviving a massive avalanche, as well as a terrible sting from a jellyfish. Also featuring footage on deathly heat in the desert, white-water rapids and much more.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Volcanoes
programme.desc: Exploding glaciers, venomous snakes and ground crumbling earthquakes. How to survive being buried alive by a massive avalanche and what do when face-to-face with scorching lava erupting from a volcano is also featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Gators and Ice Tsunami
programme.desc: What would you do if a wall of ice threatened to crush your home? Could you cope being trapped in an elevator? Incredible video pits you against deadly black ice, intense sandstorms, and hungry alligators!

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving Animal Attacks
programme.desc: Jaw-dropping animal videos show how weather affects moose, wild turkeys and vicious reef sharks. What to do when a 7000-pound whale drags you deep into the ocean and how to respond when a raging buffalo charges is featured.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Gulf of Mexico Monster
programme.desc: Hurricane Michael becomes only the 4th Cat 5 to ever hit the U.S. mainland. As Michael's fury peaks, deadly flying projectiles force a storm tracker and his team to ride out the eyewall in their car.

programme.title: Storage Wars: From Dust 'Til Dawn
programme.desc: The desert country of Mojave, California, hosts a rough auction where the buyers have to dig deep to find value.

programme.title: Storage Wars: An Auction Too Far
programme.desc: A tough start in Santa Ana leads to a long day, as the buyers hit a second auction in Hawaiian Gardens, in hopes of finding a great locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mo' Money, Mo' Valley
programme.desc: Lockers go for big bucks as the buyers hit auctions in Moreno Valley, California. Ivy and Dave duke it out for a pair of units while Mary tries to avoid the shrapnel. One buyer hits it big with a twice-in-a-lifetime find that provides over $10K in profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock, Stock and One Smoking Darrell

programme.desc: In Atlanta, DJ and the HiTech Towing crew have to deal with a raucous impound outside of a nightclub. Nik Morgan, the owner of Morgan Towing in Oklahoma, is called to recover a tractor trailer that crashed into a lake.

programme.desc: Fists fly when a quiet Michigan courtroom erupts into an all-out melee; a pro-pot defendant lights up right in front of a judge; a tension-filled husband and wife murder trial ends with a shocking verdict; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A convict makes a surprise attack; the Portland MAX killer lashes out in court; a defendant trying to escape court gets stopped by a bulletproof window.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A stalker tries to take his own life in the courtroom, the family of a murder victim attempts to get revenge, and a judge throws the book at teen murder suspects.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An overdose occurs in a court bathroom, an arsonist loses his cool and a judge shocks the courtroom and the defendant with a creative punishment.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge takes a bullet and fires back, and a defendant tries to charm his way out of jail. Then, a woman provides testimony to send her boyfriend to prison for life.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A Massachusetts courtroom erupts in a storm of fists and f-bombs, a judge pays the price for outrageous behavior and a doctor appears for a zoom hearing during surgery.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime: Get Out of My House
programme.desc: A deadly shootout ensues when intruders wake up sleeping homeowners, and a model and her husband are robbed at gunpoint. Plus, a man in his yard holds armed robber at bay with a machete.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime: Assaulted at Work
programme.desc: A disgruntled renter shoots an apartment manager, and a fast food worker is assaulted by an unhinged customer. Plus, a bar owner chokes his employee.

programme.title: The First 48: Easy Money/ Ambushed
programme.desc: Young father shot in the back in Dallas, but no one wants to talk; later in Cleveland, brazen corner store stickup leaves innocent clerk dead.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hellcopter
programme.desc: The joker that required medical attention during the fat foot race punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Nationals Disaster
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q fumble through the aisles of a grocery store and re-gift the kooky contents of a mystery bag. Then, the guys must seek out the chosen one, in an embarrassing needle-in-a-haystack challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Spaghetti and Meatballs Episode
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Soup's On Episode
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal dine and discuss their lives. Find out what's on the menu and whether they'll ever actually cook tenderloin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Shane Ray vs. Michael the Fan
programme.desc: Super Bowl Champ Shane Ray uses some sick moves at a hospital, and Olympic Gold Medalist Summer Sanders wants to help a fan make a big splash.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Connor Fields vs. Taina the Fan
programme.desc: Josh Norman goes undercover again to talk about how much he hates Josh Norman, and one fan gets a wild ride with BMX legend Connor Fields.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Elevating the Game

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Waddle, a Scratch ...
programme.desc: Find out the record for the most people Michael has tricked at once, where he gets his BS skills from, and how he puts his artistic abilities to use.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Just Smash It Out
programme.desc: Find out what props made our magic team nervous to purchase, what trick gave Michael freezer burn, and what Michael's favourite moment of the series is thus far.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Lizard Law
programme.desc: Never before seen footage; a severed camera cable; the magic team messing with Michael during a trick.

programme.desc: The trick that Michael initially thought was too goofy. The trick that took nearly a week of rehearsals and tested Michael's memory.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Boxing Boys

programme.desc: High school sweethearts are excited to rekindle their romance in San Miguel de Allende, Mexico. Their second shot at love is full of potential, but they'll have to relearn and recalibrate before they can finally settle into their first home together.

programme.title: House Hunters: Country Life for Family of Seven in Georgia
programme.desc: A family of seven relocates for a job opportunity and looks for a new home in Atlanta. She wants something move-in ready with a lot of land for a potential farm, but he prefers a home that's impressive and grand, and doesn't mind projects to save money.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Lake or No Lake in Geneva
programme.desc: After accepting a job promotion, a wife and mother relocates her family of six to Geneva. They're looking for a spacious house with at least four bedrooms, and she's money conscious, but he doesn't mind spending more to get the lake view he really wants.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Mid-Mod Oasis
programme.desc: A homeowner seeks Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell her inconsistently styled midcentury modern house. By decking out a dreamy backyard oasis and trimming trees to show off the water and mountain vista, the twins clear the way for a high sales price.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Road House to Show House
programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay help a family struggling to sell their roadside rambler. Hoping to distract buyers from the road noise outside, the twins make some bold design choices to turn the dated ranch house into a stylish home that a new family will love.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Moving Sale Makeover
programme.desc: A couple is moving out of state for work and needs Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell their home. The twins revamp their outdated ranch with a modern farmhouse style designed to reel in buyers who love to entertain.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Putting Down Roots in Georgia
programme.desc: A military family that's used to moving with little notice receives his latest post orders. They hope to find a forever home in Georgia where they can settle down when he retires in six years.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Moving Our Crazy Little Troop
programme.desc: First-time homebuyers Jeremy and Stacey have just one weekend to find the perfect home before the Army moves them from Fort Bragg to Fort Lee. They struggle to find a good fit for their active, growing family of three kids and two dogs.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Financial Freedom in Fort Worth
programme.desc: A woman gets to live her dream of being a stay-at-home mom when her husband lands a new job in Fort Worth, TX. However, he must start his new position immediately and they are in a rush to find their forever home.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Coming Together in Carolina
programme.desc: Ten years ago, a blended family of six moved into a townhome in Charleston, South Carolina, but a new job opportunity has them heading to Greensboro, North Carolina. In one weekend, they must find a home that fits both their large family and tight budget.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Under the Same Roof in Ft. Lee
programme.desc: A couple who met in boot camp are now married with an expanding family. They have finally received orders to the same military base in Virginia, but being stationed in two different states will make finding their new home in a speedy market tricky.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Finding Space Off Base
programme.desc: A family is relocating from Virginia to Millington, Tennessee, in four weeks, but Mom will be too busy attending Officer Training School to help with the move. They have to find the perfect home for two kids and five fur babies before she ships off!

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Gearing Up for Georgia
programme.desc: A couple has lived in their California home for 11 years, but now they've received a dream job offer in Georgia, where they have family ties. With their house under contract, these perfectionists must find a home that meets their needs in two days.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Joining the Force in Mesa
programme.desc: The pressure is building for a couple that's moving to Mesa, AZ, with their two kids so he can start police academy training in just three weeks. When they enter a bidding war for their top choice, they must scramble to find a solution.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Hot Market in Atlanta
programme.desc: Jenn and Ryan have already relocated several times for work, but with their two children now in high school, a move from Seattle to Atlanta could be the hardest one yet. With Ryan on the road more than at home, they have just two days to find a home.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Carolina Is Calling
programme.desc: A couple who wanted to live in North Carolina was rocked by the recession and moved to Oregon instead. Twelve years and two kids later, they're trying again, but with their current home under contract, they have no time to spare in finding a new place.

programme.title: Home Town: Southern Italianate Charm
programme.desc: Ben and Erin Napier get the opportunity to find and restore a home for some long-time friends. They're hoping to find a historical house with a porch and cozy charm.

programme.title: Home Town: A Little Rough, a Little Refined
programme.desc: Caroline and her husband, Corey, are moving home to follow her dream of opening a men's store. With a budget of $150,000, they're hoping to find a house that matches their authentic, early-century style and has an office worthy of their new business.

programme.title: Home Town: A Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are eager to welcome a new pediatrician who hopes to settle down with his wife and work in the beautiful community. The couple wants a historical charmer with room to grow and a spacious outdoor area for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: Moving to Main Street
programme.desc: A woman wants to downsize and move into town to be closer to friends and work. With her all-in budget of $125,000, she hopes to find a small home with a maintenance-free yard, a master bathroom, and space for her son.

programme.title: Home Town: Inspired By the Sea
programme.desc: A woman who has been renting for years is ready to buy a home, and her wish list includes a master bathroom with a big bathtub. Ben and Erin capitalize on the charm of the house and design a Nantucket-inspired kitchen and a stunning master suite.

programme.title: Home Town: There's Just Something About a Porch
programme.desc: A couple is looking for a historic home in the country with a porch and plenty of green space. Ben and Erin transform their new home into a classic, dogtrot-style house full of historic charm and Southern touches.

programme.desc: Four smiths crack open crucibles to reveal surprise metals they'll use to forge signature blades. The two surviving smiths move on to their home forges to recreate the legendary sword of King Charlemagne: the Joyeuse.

programme.desc: To prove himself worthy of his fiancee, a dancer tries to make it big, only to fall for his dancing partner.

programme.title: Movie: A Tale of Two Cities

programme.title: Movie: Test Pilot

programme.desc: After finding a nest of eggs on the terrace, Jessie and Ravi discover that Mr. Kipling is really Ms. Kipling, and a mom-to-be. After misplacing her eggs, Ravi realizes he may have to work at becoming a better grandparent to baby lizards.

programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: When Hate Kills
programme.desc: Police in small town Louisiana investigate the mysterious and brutal murder of a beloved neighbor with no known enemies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Trust
programme.desc: Wealthy residents felt safe in their gated community but it was not safe for one millionaire, murdered in his waterfront home. Police investigated but the case grew cold. Turned out the key to solving it, or two keys, were right at the front door.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Man Who Wasn't There
programme.desc: He was the hardworking dad, she the doting mom. In the still of the night, strangers armed with knives destroyed all they had built together. Turns out, someone was hiding an ugly secret. Police would hatch an elaborate plan to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Deadly Path
programme.desc: When a woman falls to her death while hiking with her husband in Rocky Mountain National Park, rangers question if her death was an accident or a heinous act of violence.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A successful, seemingly healthy doctor collapses at home and is rushed to the ER, leaving friends and colleagues puzzled. When her blood test reveals what killed her, the case goes from a medical mystery to murder mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Marc Despain was a married father of two and a successful real estate appraiser. He was busy building a life, until his ended all too soon. Investigators wondered if money was a motive, or maybe a family rift. His loved ones wanted answers.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Englewood Killer
programme.desc: Chicago police are investigating the murders of several women, whose bodies are discovered in abandoned buildings barefoot. Evidence indicates there is one offender, now police need to locate him.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Classified to Kill
programme.desc: Chicago detectives believe a serial killer is using the classified ads to lure and murder his victims. The investigation is set ablaze when flames obliterate evidence, until police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Snapped: Tanasha Siena
programme.desc: A 17-year relationship ends in gunfire, leaving two children fatherless.

programme.title: Snapped: Deborah Huiett
programme.desc: The discovery of an unidentified woman’s decomposed body in a roadside ditch leads to a mystery that unravels a deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Snapped: Michele Donohue
programme.desc: She said her husband ran away with his much younger mistress, but after years of suspicion, police find him much closer to home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secret Lives
programme.desc: Missing wife, grieving husband; turns out, both had secrets. Jen Ramsaran vanished just before Christmas and detectives needed to know if her online life held the key to this mystery or if the answer was closer to home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: Lisa and Kevin Knoefel seemed like the perfect couple. They were busy raising three children, and then welcomed a foster child too. When Sabrina admitted to killing Lisa, no one could understand why. This case was about to get very complicated.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Last Call
programme.desc: Friends in New Orleans hit the town looking for a night of fun. But by sunrise, one of them is found dead in the trunk of a burned-out car. No one escapes suspicion, but it's the victim's own words that eventually help bring down her killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: During a cold Minneapolis winter, a night out with good friends takes a dark turn when one of them disappears. Days later, when human remains are discovered, investigators travel a chilling path to catch a killer before another night ends in murder.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Acting On Evil
programme.desc: After a Wisconsin cast party, a mother makes an unimaginable discovery. Suddenly, a close circle of friends is under suspicion for murder. As detectives work quickly to unravel this mystery, another vicious attack may lead them to their killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Inside Job
programme.desc: In Hamburg, NY, employees at the local Toys 'R' Us are faced with the unthinkable when one of their own is savagely killed during an otherwise typical nightshift. Suddenly, every co-worker is a suspect, but is one masking as a murderer?

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A rowdy night out at a Chicago pub turns deadly when daybreak reveals a mutilated body. Police cross state lines as they try to track a killer, but it will take an unexpected call and a brutal betrayal to finally solve this case and find justice.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Unholy Secrets
programme.desc: A pastor places a frantic 911 call, pleading for help to save his fiancée who he says just shot herself. As investigators follow the unravelling truth, and look closer at the crime scene, a darker side to this happy relationship stuns everyone.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dark Echoes
programme.desc: A weekend trip to an Alaskan lodge turns deadly for a young mother when she's shot and killed by her boyfriend. The death is ruled an accident and the case is closed until an eerily similar incident in Montana drives investigators to reopen the case.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: I Love You to Pieces
programme.desc: A father shoots a masked intruder after he is ambushed in his own garage. As the unknown assailant clings to life, LAPD try to make sense of the strange situation, revealing a twisted web of manipulation and lies within this unsuspecting family.

programme.title: Movie: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: The Four Horsemen are forced into a new mission by a tech prodigy. They must attempt to steal a heavily guarded computer chip, which is considered an impossible heist. If they succeed, they can clear their names and discover the mastermind behind it all.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Old Man and the 'C' Student

programme.title: The Simpsons: Monty Can't Buy Me Love

programme.title: The Simpsons: They Saved Lisa's Brain
programme.desc: Homer gets everyone to embrace humiliation in order to win a contest; Lisa joins MENSA.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thirty Minutes Over Tokyo

programme.title: The Simpsons: Beyond Blunderdome
programme.desc: Homer gives his honest opinion to Mel Gibson at a test screening of Mel's new film.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Guess Who's Coming to Criticize Dinner?

programme.desc: Bonnie gets cold feet when considering her future with Adam and Christy risks failing an important test in order to help a fellow alcoholic.

programme.title: Mom: Fish Town and Too Many Thank You's

programme.title: Mom: A Seafaring Ancestor and a Bloomin' Onion
programme.desc: Christy discovers she and her younger classmate, Cooper make a good team both in and out of the classroom. Meanwhile, Bonnie steps up when a newly sober Natasha fears she can't handle motherhood.

programme.title: Mom: Fancy Crackers and Giant Women

programme.title: Mom: Poodle Fuzz and a Twinge of Jealousy

programme.title: Black-ish: Every Day I'm Struggling
programme.desc: When Rainbow and Dre realize Junior's been taking them for granted, they decide it's time to band together and cut him off for good. Meanwhile, Jack discovers he has a very lucrative talent.

programme.title: Black-ish: Feminisn't

programme.title: Black-ish: When I Grow Up (To Be a Man)
programme.desc: Jack gets cut from the basketball team and it leads to a family discussion about him being short for his age. Dre is worried for his future, but Bow feels strongly that Jack will overcome his adversity and be stronger for it.

programme.title: Movie: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: The Four Horsemen are forced into a new mission by a tech prodigy. They must attempt to steal a heavily guarded computer chip, which is considered an impossible heist. If they succeed, they can clear their names and discover the mastermind behind it all.

programme.title: Movie: Holmes & Watson
programme.desc: Sidekicks and best friends Sherlock Holmes and John Watson race against time when someone is murdered in Buckingham Palace. At the scene of the crime they find a letter from Holmes' nemesis Moriarty, announcing his intention to kill Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Movie: Blockers
programme.desc: Three parents try to stop their daughters from losing their virginity on prom night.

programme.title: Movie: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life

programme.title: Movie: Jack the Giant Slayer

programme.desc: A cab driver is pulled back into a military mission by a former superior to protect a mysterious woman who holds the key to saving Earth. Together, they retrieve four stones that represent the elements in order to stop an entity of pure evil.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Feliz Navidog
programme.desc: It’s a busy week at Pol Vet, but with Christmas right around the corner, spirits are high.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Sprain, Sprain, Go Away
programme.desc: The veteran docs deal with stumbling emus, bruised colts, limping pigs and infected dogs.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Supe-Pol-stitious
programme.desc: These vets are fully equipped to handle the unusual cases that occur on Friday the 13th.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hocus Pol-cus
programme.desc: It’s fall in Michigan, and Pol Veterinary Services is ready for Halloween.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Homeward Hound
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Veterinary Services pulls together to help a dog that was hit by a car.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: I Wallaby Your Baby!
programme.desc: An adorable baby wallaby visits the clinic and charms the entire staff.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Mini Mouse
programme.desc: Dr. K juggles multiple emergencies including a duck that was shot and a pig in labor.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: This Little Piggie Goes Berserk!
programme.desc: A young monkey with anger issues is treated and a guinea pig has a lump under its chin.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Oui, Oui... Piggie!
programme.desc: A duck with a rusty hook in his foot rushes in, a very sick ferret presents losing weight at an alarming rate and a rabbit with a severely twisted neck has her owners in a panic, all while a pretty pig gets a pedicure.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Goodnight Musk Ox
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley relocates baby musk oxen to a new home and treats a wolf with an eye emergency.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Volcano Temple
programme.desc: The Pantheon is a 2,000-year-old temple with a dark secret; today, using cutting-edge archaeological methods and brand-new evidence, experts look beneath the streets of Rome to find out why it was built and how it survived so long.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Unearthed: American Monument Mysteries
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty and Mount Rushmore each hold astonishing secrets that are now being discovered; experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal new evidence that could rewrite the history behind these historic American monuments.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Myth of the Templars
programme.desc: The fabled stories of the Knights Templar have become blurred over the centuries with varying depictions told in literature and film; now, Jamie Theakston separates fact from fiction and investigates the truth behind this legendary religious order.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Myth of the Templars
programme.desc: The fabled stories of the Knights Templar have become blurred over the centuries with varying depictions told in literature and film; now, Jamie Theakston separates fact from fiction and investigates the truth behind this legendary religious order.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Unearthed: Statue of Liberty: The New Secrets
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty is one of the most iconic sights in the world, yet there are still secrets to be found and mysteries to be solved. Historians, archaeologists and engineers embark on a quest to unravel the inspiration behind her curious design.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Catacombs
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth containing thousands of human skeletons is a dark mystery beneath the streets of Rome, and now, experts are using cutting-edge tech to reveal what killed them and why they were buried in this eerie place.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age
programme.desc: An Ice Age relic found in a mysterious cave is evidence of prehistoric humans' connection to the supernatural.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Birth of the Earth
programme.desc: The Earth was formed by a series of cosmic cataclysms including the most powerful blast in the Universe. Look at whether the same chain of events could have created other earths inhabited by creatures like us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: We don't yet know where the edge of the universe is or what happens there, but thanks to cutting-edge technology and new discoveries, experts might finally reveal the secrets of the phenomena that can be found in deepest reaches of the cosmos.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: Splashdown Crew-1
programme.desc: Follow live coverage of SpaceX and NASA Crew-1 as the first Dragon capsule returns to earth in a watery splashdown, marking the end of a five-month mission on the International Space Station.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Expanded Edition: First Second
programme.desc: Travel back to the first second of the universe's existence with the latest science and information.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey to a Black Hole
programme.desc: Journey to the heart of the M87 supermassive black hole, the first and only black hole ever photographed, and explore the mystery of how it grew so large, what lies inside and how it controls the entire galaxy.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Search for a Second Earth
programme.desc: Astronomers seek the answer to a second earth with spectroscopy, direct imaging and telescopes. They hope to find evidence of atmospheres, magnetospheres and signs of life.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Blood In The Water
programme.desc: When a bag containing body parts washes up on the shore of the lake, the search for missing 10-year old Holly Jones becomes a grisly murder investigation. Police must race to find the perpetrator of this shocking crime before another child is murdered.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: When Ashley Benson is found murdered in a trendy Portland hotel, detectives quickly dial in on three suspects, all of whom have been romantically linked to Ashley while Ashley's parents must come to grips with their daughter's secret life.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Driven To Murder
programme.desc: After locals smell what can only be the scent of charred meat, police find burned remains in an abandoned mining pit in the small town of Hibbing, Minnesota. Before they can investigate who committed the crime, first they must identity the body.

programme.title: True Conviction: A True Psychopath
programme.desc: The unspeakably gruesome murders of an elderly couple rock the town of Davis, California. Police examine the victims' bizarre injuries to determine if this is the random work of a sadistic psychopath or the premeditated plot of an unhinged family member.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Best Lives Cut Short
programme.desc: When entrepreneur Ash Rowell's good life is cut short after he's gunned down, police suspect a hit. Suspicion falls on his own family members. Then, after a long night of partying, two friends' overdoses may turn out to be something more sinister.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boom Town
programme.desc: A new family learns how tight-knit their new community is when a slight against one turns the entire street against them leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: True Conviction: A True Psychopath
programme.desc: The unspeakably gruesome murders of an elderly couple rock the town of Davis, California. Police examine the victims' bizarre injuries to determine if this is the random work of a sadistic psychopath or the premeditated plot of an unhinged family member.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Best Lives Cut Short
programme.desc: When entrepreneur Ash Rowell's good life is cut short after he's gunned down, police suspect a hit. Suspicion falls on his own family members. Then, after a long night of partying, two friends' overdoses may turn out to be something more sinister.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Head in the Oven
programme.desc: Two neighbouring bachelors start out as friends. Harmless banter turns into threats eventually igniting an escalating war. The violence ends with a murder so shocking it is almost beyond belief.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Wishing Well Mystery
programme.desc: After Alyce Seff's body is found in a wishing well, the town of German Village, Ohio, is shocked to find the elderly landlady had as many enemies as she did friends. It will take police nine years to solve her case.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Lack of answers in her daughter's murder force a mother to embark on a years-long quest to change nationwide laws that finally allow her to catch a killer.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: Oh Mother, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: When a beloved woman goes missing her family fears someone close is responsible. A daughter and sister stop at nothing to find justice even if it takes more than a decade.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Taunt the Cops
programme.desc: Jimmy Maxwell is no stranger to prison life. But every time he gets arrested, he outsmarts officials and escapes. His go-for-broke nature makes him a menace for authorities, who come face to face with his volatile nature each time they corner him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Rich Widow
programme.desc: Brian Maurice Fuller charms his way into wealthy people's homes, only to rob them blind. He gets caught, does his time and is released. But Fuller can't resist the lure of robbing the rich. He eludes police until a tip leads them right to his door.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A young father calls 911, gasping that he accidentally shot himself while working on a farm. Police race to find him and keep him on the line. They hear a second shot--a shot that reveals an astonishing twist: this shooting was no accident.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: A mother is gunned down next to her toddler, sparking a homicide investigation involving passion, kidnapping and intimidation. When cops discover a dictatphone, it leads them on the trail of intimate audio recordings that could prove reveal her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: She's Gone
programme.desc: When a young girl kidnapped from her bed in the middle of the night is found dead in a nearby canal, it marks the beginning of one of Salt Lake City's most notorious child murder investigations.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: In 2012, 42-year-old Michelle Mockbee's beaten body was found at work. She was wearing her pink sapphire ring, so robbery was ruled out. Employees and her husband Dan were interrogated. The case stalled until video surfaced that blew it wide open.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Memory and Mystery
programme.desc: Twelve years after a brutal attack that left her almost dead, a woman undergoes hypnosis to recover memories of the man who assailed her. New DNA technology uses a single drop of blood to paint a portrait of a suspect. And police close in on an arrest.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Donna Fontaine and her boyfriend Fred Palahniuk are found shot dead in a burning building in remote Kendrick, Idaho. A conspiracy of silence protects the killer until his lovers crack and confess the damning evidence needed to convict him.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Drive with Danger
programme.desc: A friendly night out ends in a shallow grave for a beautiful young woman and her killer evades police for decades.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Trail of Evil
programme.desc: In 1979, bar manager Harriet Simmons disappears during a trip to Nashville. In 1987, Jerri Ann Jones vanishes after she gets off work. It would take more than two decades for detectives to learn the identity of their common killer.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Long Arm of the Law
programme.desc: When two unrelated murders are traced to a violent pair of siblings, investigators are led on a wild goose chase, across two countries. It's a case that will consume not only the Tyler and Smith County authorities, but the U.S. Marshals and FBI.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Russian Arms Dealer
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Pablo Escobar: Narco King
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. But he met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Capturing Bin Laden
programme.desc: Capturing bin Laden tracks the rise and fall of Osama bin Laden, a man who spent the decade following the September 11 attacks at the top of America's most wanted list.

programme.title: FBI's Terrorist Takedown
programme.desc: It was the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lured ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and took them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Edge of War: MacArthur's Great Gamble
programme.desc: Failing to stop Kim Il Sung's forces on land, MacArthur devises an amphibious assault at Inchon with the intelligence aid of naval officer Lt. Eugene Clark.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Liberty Trust Building
programme.desc: Robert and the team take on the old Liberty Trust Building in downtown Roanoke, VA. After salvaging a few vintage bathrooms, they remove two stately vault doors. Later, the team heads back to the shop to create a wedding present for Grayson's big day.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Boarded Up Beauty
programme.desc: Nicole is on a mission to save vacant homes from the wrecking ball and her latest project is taking on a boarded up and previously condemned home from the late 80s.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Cabinets Remade
programme.desc: Turning her attention to the kitchen, Nicole must get creative and figure out how to update and reuse cabinets that where in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bright, Open Living Room
programme.desc: Turning a duplex back into a single-family home isn't always easy, but that's just what Nicole wants to do.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Remade
programme.desc: Nicole tries to figure out a way to incorporate the old kitchen pantry into a new master bathroom and has to deal with outdated and out of order parts.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Back Yard on a Budget
programme.desc: Nicole doesn't have much to work with in the back yard, but she's making the best with what she's got. Lifting up the garage to pour a new foundation beats the cost of building a new one from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Revived Exterior
programme.desc: With work on the 4th Street house nearly complete, Nicole continues to fix up the neglected exterior.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Scrap Wood Basement
programme.desc: Nicole takes on a basement restoration in order to help out a sick friend and does her best to use as much scrap wood and materials as she possible can.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Fire Damage Fixes
programme.desc: Nicole heads to her hometown of Detroit, Michigan to save a 1920s home that has been vacant since a fire in the house next door left it severely damaged.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cracked Pipe Kitchen
programme.desc: Work continues on Nicole's project in her hometown of Detroit. Fire damage isn't the only thing causing problems: the main plumbing stack has a huge crack in it - causing years of water damage that has the walls crumbling at the touch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Exterior Miracles
programme.desc: Tired of the house being an eyesore in the neighborhood, Nicole must remove all the debris left over from demolishing the burnt out house on the lot next door.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Yellow Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with an old Victorian that still has most of its original details.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf and Turf in the Sunshine State
programme.desc: Roger Mooking shows creative ways Americans cook with fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southwest Smoke Signals
programme.desc: The smoke signals of fiery feasts lure Roger Mooking to the Southwest, where his first stop is West Alley BBQ and Smokehouse in Chandler, Ariz. The hot spot specializes in Tennessee-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent D.C. Dining
programme.desc: Michael and Jenni 'JWoww' Farley, reality TV star and winner of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition, team up to tackle the best classic barbecue, freshest farmhouse burgers and most outrageous microbrews our nation's capital has to offer.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad of flying your own brain like a tiny drone. When SpongeBob and Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: The Loud House: Out of the Picture/ Room With a Feud
programme.desc: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Bobby visit their crazy, chaotic extended family. Bobby fits in great but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Little do they know, their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Laughing Matter/ No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lock 'N Loud/ The Whole Picture
programme.desc: Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door; Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fool's Paradise/ Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: How To Use A Frozen Krabby Patty
programme.desc: The Frozen Krabby Patty is now for more than eating!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Chosen Chipmunk/ Double Dangus
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's new virtual reality game and is transported to a world in desperate need of a hero. The chipmunks discover Officer Dangus has a twin brother.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Tree House/ Saving Simon
programme.desc: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they made it their home. Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to stop his departure and keep him at home.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Unboxing Day/ Dave's Pavilion
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Hail to the Chief/ Twistory
programme.desc: Timmy decides to run for student body president to gain the attention of a popular gild.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fool's Day Out/ Deja Vu
programme.desc: Timmy calls upon the April Fool for help, then wishes for a button to reset any day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Information Stupor Highway
programme.desc: Timmy turns into data and dives into the Internet in order to stop e-mail.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Ruled Out/ That's Life
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for parents who won't care about rules; Timmy brings a garden to life.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Danger Force Awakens
programme.desc: Captain Man has a new crew of superhero sidekicks, Danger Force, but when he tells them there's a 'crime drought' in Swellview, they begin to suspect that he's fighting crime without them.

programme.title: Danger Force: Monsty
programme.desc: When Mika tries too hard to win Man’s Nest Employee of The Month, she creates a monster that could ruin the telethon Danger Force is hosting.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fed Up/ Shell Shock
programme.desc: The kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln doesn't trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: The Loud House: Back Out There/ Spell It Out
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, tries to cure his post-breakup blues.Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book once to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Unfair Science Fair / Unfair Science Fair Redux
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: The Lab Rats are on the run and end up as stowaways on a cargo freighter headed to parts unknown.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: The Lab Rats are on the run and end up as stowaways on a cargo freighter headed to parts unknown.

programme.title: Lab Rats: The Jet-Wing
programme.desc: Davenport tries to raise money for a new lab by attempting a death-defying stunt.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Grandma's Here to Stay
programme.desc: Dusty is stressed when his Grandma moves into his house and is now sharing a room with him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Fish You Were Here
programme.desc: Bailey is upset when she is the only one of her classmates not invited to a birthday party.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Up All-Nighter
programme.desc: Facing a morning deadline, the crew pulls an all-nighter at Uncle Will's to edit the pranks and upload them to their channel in time. Meanwhile, Herman poses as a kid who thinks he's a medieval knight and convinces his babysitter to do whatever he says.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Chicken FTW
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: Parker Plays: S'nailed It
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Escape From Phineas Tower/ The Remains of the Platypus
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are inspired by an antique escape chamber to build a computer-controlled tower that allows them to explore the world of escapement. Craziness is going rampant in Danville, but no one has any idea what is going on.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline
programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Times Circle/ Super Gramma
programme.desc: Tilly and Remy put on a sidewalk play while Cricket and Bill meet their favorite costumed superheroes. Cricket and Tilly try to keep Gramma at home while she recovers from eye surgery.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Storm the Castle

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Bon Bon the Birthday Clown
programme.desc: Star has second thoughts about attending a dead clown's séance, when Jackie asks Marco to go to the school dance with him.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Face the Music
programme.desc: On Star's Song Day, Star and Marco work with principle songstrel Ruberiot to create a ballad for the event.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Starcrushed
programme.desc: Hoping to help her forget about her strained friendship with Marco, Star's friends convince her to ditch the Diaz' end-of-the-school-year party for a more dangerous bash.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Nightlife/ Deep Dive
programme.desc: Star learns that Marco and Hekapoo have been dealing with rogue interdimensional portals. Star’s sleep-portaling becomes a danger, and she decides to put a stop to it.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Monster Bash

programme.desc: Alone and lost, Butters determinedly makes his way through porn theatres and gay bath houses in an effort to get his dad back home in time to eat at Bennigan's for his parents' anniversary.

programme.title: South Park: The Last of the Meheecans
programme.desc: Cartman joins the U.S. Border Patrol.

programme.title: South Park: Butterballs
programme.desc: Butters is the victim of an unlikely bully.

programme.title: South Park: Freak Strike
programme.desc: When the boys learn that talk shows offer prizes to people who are grossly disfigured they can't sign Butters up fast enough.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 28, 2021
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: Basic Cable
programme.desc: Scott Malkinson’s desperate to impress the new girl in his class.

programme.title: South Park: Insheeption
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counsellor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: South Park: It Hits the Fan
programme.desc: When the HBC Network allows a show to utter curse words on the air, it threatens to destroy the world. It's up to the Knights of Standards and Practices, as well as Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny, to censor the airwaves and save the world.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 28, 2021

programme.title: South Park: Grey Dawn

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love
programme.desc: A sexual abuse scandal involving Catholic priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.

programme.title: South Park: The Entity

programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman are thrilled to have their old friend back when the town is jolted by Chef's sudden reappearance. The boys soon notice that Chef is acting different and his strange behaviour begins to get him in serious trouble.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Ship'rect
programme.desc: Cleveland and his friends prepare to enter Stoolbend's annual boat race as a team, but when Cleveland's celebrity idol moves to town, Cleveland makes it a priority to befriend him.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Hurricane

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: A Nightmare on Grace Street
