programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Code to Gold
programme.desc: Josh scours Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale Treasure, worth millions today. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, Josh takes a detour to Philadelphia to uncover missing pieces to the puzzle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Yamashita's Gold
programme.desc: Josh heads to the Philippines, searching for gold hidden by Japan in WWII.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Samurai Sword of Power
programme.desc: Josh explores ancient shrines hidden in the mountains and underground tunnels across Japan in search for the missing mystical Honjo sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai and forges his own samurai sword.

programme.title: Expedition X: The Beast of Bray Road
programme.desc: Josh Gates, Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres are hot on the trail of a werewolf-like creature terrorizing locals in Wisconsin. Eyewitness accounts and sightings lead them to a remote forest where frightening clues may reveal the beast's true identity.

programme.title: Expedition X: UFOs Over New Mexico
programme.desc: Responding to recent UFO sightings, Josh Gates sends his team to New Mexico for a new investigation into the infamous, unsolved Socorro Landing Incident. Unleashing never-before-used technology and with new witnesses, Jess and Phil look to solve Socorro.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Italy's Barbarian Booty
programme.desc: To find the plundered riches of the Roman Empire, Josh Gates must locate the tomb of the Visigoth king Alaric in Italy. The hunt extends from the capital of Rome to the southern city of Cosenza, where the mayor is spearheading an effort to find the tomb.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Wolfpack vs. the Wolf
programme.desc: The Brown family gets ready to defend themselves against dangerous new predator that's stalking their ranch.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Clear and Pheasant Danger
programme.desc: The Browns take part in a competitive pheasant hunt as a way to celebrate and give thanks for everything they have.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Fowl Weather Friends
programme.desc: Birdi goes on a treacherous hunt to bring home meat for the family and save her chickens from slaughter. Later, Noah constructs an automatic diaper machine and Gabe gets bush insight from Ami that he can pass along to Raquell.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Chaos Before the Storm
programme.desc: Winter is approaching yet the Wolfpack is feeling the heat! Bear works furiously to finalize an addition to his home as Billy faces a new medical crisis. A big winter storm forces Noah and Rhain Alisha to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Big Push
programme.desc: The Brown siblings struggle to finish their ambitious homesites as the ground begins to freeze. Later, the Wolfpack gets the call that Rhain-Alisha has gone into labor and races to the birth of baby Eli.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Legends vs. Swamp
programme.desc: Elite Naked and Afraid veterans prepare for an epic 60 days in Louisiana’s alligator-filled swamps. These All-Stars must endure constant predator threats, torrential rain and the brutal cold of winter in the swamp to earn the right to be called Legends.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: That All You Got, Louisiana?
programme.desc: Twelve All-Stars face 60 days in Louisiana's punishing swamps. Surrounded by aggressive alligators and snakes, it's rodent bacteria attacking the All-Stars' most private areas that threatens to take them out.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Narrow Escape
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy braves gators in the Florida night to snatch a party boy's Cessna Float plane. Kevin Lacy enrols a vengeful divorcé for a high-altitude, high-risk heist in Colorado and Ken and Danny have a close encounter with an angry debtor's shovel.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Alone in Alaska
programme.desc: Adrenalin junkie Mike Kennedy boldly sets out into the remote Alaskan wilderness, braving wolf country and bitter temperatures, in a hunt for a Piper Super Cub.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Blood and Mud
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey ends up battered and bruised after snatching a $1 million Falcon 20 owned by a debtor he has a long, rocky history with. Mike Kennedy is called in to repo a Cessna 208 Caravan used in the illegal trafficking of exotic animals.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Wounded Warbird
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey greenlights Heather Sterzick's first solo repo, but she pays the price for her mistakes. Mike Kennedy returns to his old stomping grounds in Puerto Rico to recover a relic from the old family business.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jeanne's Story
programme.desc: Jeanne lives in an unhygienic household with her mother and schizophrenic father. At well-over 600 lbs., Jeanne might never get weight-loss surgery as she runs into several obstacles, especially after an unexpected death in her family.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Angie J: Part 2 - Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Right when Angie starts to succeed in Dr. Now's program, her marriage falls apart and her life is thrown into chaos.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jeanne and Brandon: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Jeanne struggles to care for herself in the aftermath of her dad's death. Brandon strives to get his weight down in order to feel confident when proposing to his girlfriend Tayler and be the man she deserves.

programme.title: Save My Skin: A Sebaceous Situation
programme.desc: Connor's acne makes him feel like a monster, Jo wants her cyst removed and her old nose back, Emma's rosacea flares red hot, and Figen has a painful lipoma on her neck.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Headaches and Zombies
programme.desc: A violent patient who cannot be sedated endangers a pregnant ER doctor. An unexplained headache turns life threatening for a mom during a vacation, while a man with a fencepost through his torso jumps the triage line on a busy night in the ER.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jeanne and Brandon: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Jeanne struggles to care for herself in the aftermath of her dad's death. Brandon strives to get his weight down in order to feel confident when proposing to his girlfriend Tayler and be the man she deserves.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Headaches and Zombies
programme.desc: A violent patient who cannot be sedated endangers a pregnant ER doctor. An unexplained headache turns life threatening for a mom during a vacation, while a man with a fencepost through his torso jumps the triage line on a busy night in the ER.

programme.title: Nate & Jeremiah by Design: Baby Grand
programme.desc: Brandy and Steve are novices to renovating and attempted some simple renovations but failed miserably. Worried she's losing her home, see if Nate and Jeremiah can help them create the home where they can spend family time together and create memories.

programme.title: Nate & Jeremiah by Design: Island Breeze
programme.desc: Nicole wants her dad to move in with her while he's recovering from cancer treatments, but a flood has recently destroyed her kitchen and until it's fixed, he's on his own across town. The pressure is on for Nate and Jeremiah to get him home ASAP.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Boxing Up the Past
programme.desc: Matt is eager to get the farmhouse in order, which leaves Amy stressed out and struggling to pack up 30 years of memories. Zach is up for the challenge of watching Jackson and Lilah alone for the first time, but two kids are a lot harder than one.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Lilah's Big Scare
programme.desc: Valentine's Day is coming, but problems get in the way of romance. When Lilah's cold turns into something serious, Tori's worst fears are realized. As Chris puts pressure on Amy to move out of the farmhouse, Amy and Matt battle over missed deadlines.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: The Roloff Quaranteam
programme.desc: Matt's frustration grows as Amy continues to delay her move out of the farmhouse, but when COVID-19 hits, everything comes to a stop. The families come to terms with their new normal, and Zach and Jackson celebrate their birthdays in quarantine.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Farmhouse Farewell
programme.desc: Matt clears out the farmhouse for the new renter. Meanwhile, Zach has a revelation that could change the future of the farm forever.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This Cyst Persists
programme.desc: Half of Mary's body is a size 18, while the other half is a size 8. Anthony's cyst is in the area called the Triangle of Death. Shane wants to get a lump off his back. Brandi's anxiety could prevent her from getting a lump removed from her chest.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Cystic River
programme.desc: Dennis has several giant growths on the back of his head. Juan has a rare condition he hopes Dr. Lee will understand. Natalie searches for answers as to why her body is covered in hundreds of mysterious dark bumps.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: There's Something About Jerry
programme.desc: Tammy's boyfriend, Jerry, comes to visit just in time to celebrate the sisters' favorite holiday: Halloween. Tammy's sister Misty, however, questions Jerry's intentions. Amy has to face another weigh-in after her concerning appointment with Dr. Procter.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Jerry Bites Back
programme.desc: Amy counts down the days until her delivery with an eccentric photo shoot, while the family worries that Jerry is derailing Tammy's diet. Tammy reveals her big secret to Jerry.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Everybody Hurts
programme.desc: When Tammy and Amy go see a psychic, they both get disturbing news. The family rallies together, and they are willing to try anything to help Tammy lose weight. Amy must face her worst fears when she's rushed to the ER.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Amy gets unsettling news about the birth of her baby as her high-risk pregnancy has last-minute complications. With their next weigh-in ahead of them, Chris and Tammy are cautiously optimistic until Tammy steps on the scale.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXLV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo wish that certain people had 'off buttons', do some detective work in 'bruise clues', and learn exactly how territorial animals can be in 'No Man's Land'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Mike Tyson
programme.desc: Mike Tyson joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to talk about knocking people out in the first, playing a game of "Peek-a-Boo," and the constant annoyance of "Flappy Dicks."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXCI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo try not to say the wrong thing in 'temper triggers', celebrate all the fathers out there with 'dad's weekend', and prove that older isn't always wiser with 'old dumbass'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob Gronkowski
programme.desc: Rob welcomes NFL superstar Rob Gronkowski.

programme.title: Deliciousness: Flam Baes

programme.desc: To help the campers stay cool during a heat wave, Lou announces that she’s finally caved and bought a shaved ice machine for Camp Kikiwaka!

programme.title: How the Universe Works: War of the Galaxies
programme.desc: Galaxies are locked in continual combat across the universe, and our own Milky Way will face its biggest opponent ever, the Andromeda Galaxy, in a titanic and deadly struggle that could create a new and unrecognizable super galaxy.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Giant Ice Planets
programme.desc: Astronomers are finally unlocking the mysteries to the alien underworlds of Uranus and Neptune, and experts reveal how an ancient mega-collision and a missing twin planet could uncover the secrets of these strange and frozen worlds.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Curse of the White Holes
programme.desc: Einstein predicted strange cosmic phenomena known as white holes, but scientists have yet to prove they exist; as experts investigate the tiny black holes that hide in the most ancient parts of the universe, they might finally find the smoking gun.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: World's Largest Cruise Ship

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Leaning Towers of Terror

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Holes from Hell
programme.desc: Engineering catastrophes include a giant tunnel boring machine stuck underground, a village sinking into a mountain, and massive holes that could derail a train.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Death Ray Skyscraper

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Disaster in Vegas

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Peril at the Airport
programme.desc: An airport that's sinking into the sea, a strange tower that goes wrong, and a dangerous bridge in Venice are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Stadium Disaster

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sins of Ghost Vegas

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Death of a Playmate: The Dorothy Stratten Story
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Dorothy Stratten through the eyes of those who knew her best.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Death of a Playmate: The Dorothy Stratten Story
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Dorothy Stratten through the eyes of those who knew her best.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Quickly, I'm Afraid
programme.desc: In Danville, Kentucky, a pawn store robbery leaves three people dead. Detectives struggle to identify the suspect, their only lead is a mysterious silver van. Using a trail of video to pursue the elusive vehicle is their only hope of catching a killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Do You Want to Smell Human Blood?
programme.desc: Shelby Weatherly is found brutally stabbed to death by the side of the highway, and investigators struggle to find a suspect. Forensic evidence and reports of a mysterious car lead to revealing images and evidence that point toward the vicious killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Memory and Mystery
programme.desc: Twelve years after a brutal attack that left her almost dead, a woman undergoes hypnosis to recover memories of the man who assailed her. New DNA technology uses a single drop of blood to paint a portrait of a suspect. And police close in on an arrest.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Quickly, I'm Afraid
programme.desc: In Danville, Kentucky, a pawn store robbery leaves three people dead. Detectives struggle to identify the suspect, their only lead is a mysterious silver van. Using a trail of video to pursue the elusive vehicle is their only hope of catching a killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Bloody Footprint
programme.desc: Maurice Goins, a friendly neighbor who provides meals to other tenants in his apartment complex, is found murdered in his bedroom. The case goes cold, until Lakewood, Ohio police suddenly receive a tip and the investigation is thrown into overdrive.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Death of a Playmate: The Dorothy Stratten Story
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Dorothy Stratten through the eyes of those who knew her best.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Death of a Playmate: The Dorothy Stratten Story
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Dorothy Stratten through the eyes of those who knew her best.

programme.title: Evil Kin: The American Nightmare
programme.desc: Family is everything in Korean culture. But when the Suh family starts a new life in America, tradition turns to rebellion. Their American dream soon becomes a nightmare as they find out the road to riches is paved with betrayal…and blood.

programme.title: Bride Killa: Twice the Danger
programme.desc: On Kelly Ecker's wedding day she commits herself to Scott Samson, but he has other plans for his new bride. Later, Amber Fields and Josh Hilberling rush to the alter, then at each other. Both marriages start with "I do," but end in unimaginable ruin.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: More Than a Babysitter
programme.desc: On the surface, Tina Young, has it all - a nice husband, good children, and dear friends, the Zalenski family. Her picture perfect life spirals out of control when she becomes addicted to heroin and discovers her new lover and drug dealer, Larry Tooley.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Freedom Quest
programme.desc: Beautiful, charismatic tattoo aficionado Melanie Ray has a dark past and no desire to go back to prison on a parole violation. When she meets up with childhood friend Chandler Clark sparks fly and the pair begins a love affair that will end in murder.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: The Devils Allure
programme.desc: Lonely widow Marilyn Burdick finally finds love again with Louis Plunkett, a charming real-estate agent. But Marilyn's only daughter Karen and her husband Jason doubt Louis' motivations and tension quickly escalates, triggering a deadly series of events.

programme.title: Happily Never After: Vanishing Bride
programme.desc: Lisa and Lawrence foresee a bright future: when they marry, she'll join the Army and he'll watch the kids. But their plans crumble when Lisa vanishes, in a twisting case that includes a jealous ex, a threatening fellow soldier and a brutal betrayal.

programme.title: Twisted Love: Love is Relative
programme.desc: When a woman discovers her adult (and married) son engaging in an affair with his 14-year-old stepsister, it creates a family rift that will end in tragedy.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Gone
programme.desc: Claiming to be desperate to find the missing mother of his child, a Texas man talks with Dr. Phil, but within hours he tells police a much different story.

programme.title: Disappeared: Edge of Fourteen
programme.desc: Ashley Summers is a fun-loving 14-year-old. When she vanishes on July 4th, her family is at a loss. The mystery deepens when the FBI connects her case to two other young women missing from her neighborhood. Ten years later, there's still no answer.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Rampage
programme.desc: A series of murders in California bear eerie similarities, but police have trouble connecting them -- that is until unique ballistics, mysterious surveillance, and a bloody cell phone lead them to three criminals on a deadly revenge spree.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: No Happy Ending
programme.desc: 44-year-old masseuse Larissa Macriello vanishes from her Miami apartment in June of 2013. Police find there's a dangerous edge to her carefree lifestyle, and they're thrust into a web of sex, lies, and secrets as they try to find her.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Sensing Secrets
programme.desc: Young mother of three Christine Sheddy is trying to put her life back on track after tragedy and heartbreak. But just when she's on the verge of a fresh start, she disappears without a trace and every person in her life becomes a suspect.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Israeli Commandos
programme.desc: Israeli Commandos are the most battle hardened military elite in the world. There's a commando unit for every type of mission, from hostage rescue to pre-emptive strike, all practiced to the point of perfection.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: SAS
programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: Weaponology: Israeli Commandos
programme.desc: Israeli Commandos are the most battle hardened military elite in the world. There's a commando unit for every type of mission, from hostage rescue to pre-emptive strike, all practiced to the point of perfection.

programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Heroes
programme.desc: Four stories of heroism; A golden statue for Marines shooting a battle; The medal of honor for a daring train robbery; A General's plans that led the U.S. into WWII; and a piece of paper that spells death for Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Extreme Warriors
programme.desc: Extreme warriors are trained to live and fight in the harshest environments known to man: exposed mountaintops, extreme altitude, sub-zero temperatures, and snowstorms.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Ohana New Kitchen
programme.desc: Michelle and David Jaime rearrange a whole house for a growing family in need of a new kitchen, dining room and master bedroom.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Halfway House

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Hawaiian Shirt Renovation

programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cabanas and Cannonballs
programme.desc: A couple who recently moved into a new house in Austin, Texas, has decided it's finally time to build the family pool of their kids' dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dueling Waterslides
programme.desc: Brian and Paul design the perfect pool complete with giant dueling waterslides. They face a slippery slope, however, when they battle equipment issues while building an artificial hill to support tens of thousands of pounds of natural granite rock.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Million Dollar View Pool
programme.desc: The King family seeks help building their new palace in the sunny hills of California. The Pool Kings find themselves between a rock ledge and hard design while bringing this build to life on a sloped property.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Paradise
programme.desc: The Kings take on their most spectacular project to date when a young family asks them to build the perfect pool for their dream home overlooking the mountains outside Ogden, Utah. They want the works including a 50 ft. long, 12 ft. deep pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool for a Dream Home
programme.desc: The kings create a resort in a family's backyard that includes a waterfall grotto with a slide and infinity edge. Additional elements include a splash pad and sun shelf, transforming the yard from barren to beautiful.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Retreat Pool
programme.desc: A mountain lodge with incredible views is missing one thing: a pool. Brian and Paul Porter weather rain storms to give a family an amazing outdoor living area featuring a spa with a walk-up bar, swim jets and a fire basin.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: O.G. Flavor
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits his hometown of Cleveland, where a lamb burger with kalamata olive salt gives him a nostalgic taste of his Greek heritage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Burnt Ends For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Plainview, N.Y., where a chocolate bacon burger is loaded from top to bottom with sweet and savory indulgence. A restaurant in Columbus, Ohio, has a soy-marinated pineapple hanger steak draped over spicy kimchi fried rice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies on the Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Super Sandwiches
programme.desc: From subs to clubs, Noah Cappe bites into the best sandwiches on the midway and dives into the debate about what really makes a sandwich with two unexpected sweets. Packed with meats, cheeses and pasta, these massive treats are fork-free carnival eats.

programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Mirror, Mirror on My Penguin / Hide and Eek!
programme.desc: Dad babysits the neighbor’s baby, Suki. Suki loves Waddly Penguin and gives him lots of hugs. Suddenly, Suki starts to cry, so Doc takes Waddly to the clinic. Donny and Alma pretend to be mad scientists and create an ugly monster toy.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The House That Bulworth Built
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munks/ World
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simsky/ Lucky Day
programme.desc: Simon is alarmed to discover he's been tagging private property in his sleep. Alvin's luck goes from bad to worse after Theodore finds a four-leaf clover and everything starts going his way.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Curiosity/ House Pest
programme.desc: Alvin gets a taste of his own medicine when he pulls one too many practical jokes on Simon.When Miss Croner finds termites have infested her home, she moves in with the chipmunks and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Great Chipmunk Detective/ Guitar Hero
programme.desc: When Miss Miller gets robbed, Eleanor and Theodore promise to find the culprit and bring them to justice. Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she won't reveal why she so desperately needs to learn.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Missing Miss Smith/ Monster Madness
programme.desc: When Alvin finally pushes Miss Smith too far, she quits and her replacement is a nightmare. Alvin and Simon tease The Chipettes about being scared by a movie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: He Said She Said/ Attack of the Zombies
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany give wildly differing versions of why the fire alarm went off at the school. Convinced a zombie invasion is imminent, Alvin and Theodore attempt to protect their loved ones.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Oh Brother Where Art Thou/ The Wall
programme.desc: Alvin thinks he's losing his mind when Simon goes missing and no one else even remembers who Simon is. When the girls at school cast votes for the cutest chipmunk on the bathroom wall, Alvin worries about the results.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon Sleeps/ Fireworks School
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Bobby visit their crazy, chaotic extended family. Bobby fits in great but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Little do they know, their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fool's Paradise/ Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Laughing Matter/ No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: The group must pass through the ominous Swamp of Fears.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: How To Use A Frozen Krabby Patty
programme.desc: The Frozen Krabby Patty is now for more than eating!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Pat make extra money when they decide to sell chocolate bars door to door. Also, Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy get into an fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus
programme.desc: Plankton has demolished the Chum Bucket and built a Roman colosseum in it's place. He announces there will be a gladiator show, which means togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jelly Fishing/ Plankton
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick take Squidward jelly fishing; Spongebob falls for Plankton's scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Something Smells/ Bossy Boots
programme.desc: Bob eats some sea-onion ice cream; Mr. Krabs' daughter makes some big changes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nasty Patty/ Idiot Box
programme.desc: When the health inspector comes, Krabs tries to get the joint up to code.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: What's Love Gato Do With It/ Dial M. for Mustard
programme.desc: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it. Ronnie Anne and friends try to uncover what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fast Feud/ Never Friending Story
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: No Egrets/ Meal Ticket
programme.desc: Sergio is in for a treat when a group of baby birds think he’s their mama. Ronnie Anne and Sid help Casey run his family food truck… at the Yoon Kwan concert.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sailor Mouth/ Artist Unknown
programme.desc: Bob learns a 'bad' word off of a dumpster; Bob is Squid's only student for an art class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theo's Big Night Out/ The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Theodore tries to overcome his fear of sleep-overs by spending the night at Kevin's house without Alvin or Simon. When Alvin sees every celebrity with their own personal bodyguard, he decides to train Theodore for the job.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Between a Rope and a Hard Place
programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dr. Zap vs Electroboy/ Animal House Party
programme.desc: Theodore is hit by lightning and believes he's like his comic book hero, until he's told he's actually a villain. When Derek overhears that Alvin and his brothers are alone for the weekend, he plans a wild party.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Odd Jobs/ Movie Magic
programme.desc: Dad wishes he had a cooler job; Timmy enters a film festival to impress Trixie.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Sleep Over and Over/ Mother Nature
programme.desc: Chester and AJ are feuding and Timmy is caught in the middle; mom becomes a weathercaster.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad Meet Crimson Chin
programme.desc: When Timmy accidentally releases the crimson chin's arch-villain, all heck breaks loose.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Engine Blocked/ Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad Meet the Crimson Chin
programme.desc: When Timmy's Dad goes through a mid-life crisis, he invests every ounce of his free time into rebuilding the sports car of his dreams.

programme.title: Danger Force: Ray Goes Cray
programme.desc: Two students keep Danger Force from going on missions, so Danger Force and Captain Man must use their powers to get the students to leave.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Arr in the Family/ Finders Weepers
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wants to help CJ to get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Then, Ronnie and Sid decide whether to take money from a lost coin purse they found at the mercado.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karate Chops/ Taco The Town
programme.desc: Used to being top dog, Carl can’t handle when Adelaide joins his karate class and becomes the star student./ Hector starts selling Rosa’s delicious tacos but gets overwhelmed when they’re more popular than the mercado!

programme.title: The Loud House: Picture Perfect/ Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love
programme.desc: When the kids hear Lily curse, they're worried they have been a bad influence on her. A love letter addressed to 'L' Loud shows up at the house and the family has to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out of Toon/ Hail Doofania!
programme.desc: Boys create a cartoon and cast themselves as superheroes and the villain is Candace.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 1
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Goose on the Loose
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Forbidden Fountain of the Foreverglades!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Goldie O'Gilt are turned into teenagers as they race Rockerduck to the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: She's the Mayor/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: While Candace and Stacy's relationship is put to the test, Phineas and Ferb build the ultimate lemonade stand and begin to offer franchise opportunities. Candace is awarded the opportunity to be mayor for the day, which she uses to her advantage.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Time Crisis/ Gramma Driver

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Josh to the Future
programme.desc: Josh Gates is back (to the future) with his co-star from Expedition: Back to the Future, Christopher Lloyd, The Office's Craig Robinson, Tiffany Beers who created the real-life self-lacing sneakers and a field trip that leads to time travel.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 1
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 2
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown
programme.desc: The Raneys have a challenge on their hands as they try to restore a couple's failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the homestead.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Ice Mine Cometh
programme.desc: Winter has come along with the thinnest, most unpredictable ice in decades. After three years, Shawn returns to diving under the ice in pursuit of the Tomcod claim. Kris tries to set up and mine in one day. Emily's dependable Claim 14 shocks her.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Frozen Chokehold
programme.desc: Only days into the winter mining season, a regulator freeze up cuts off Shawn's air supply. Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates. Vernon returns to the ice with an eye to buy Claim 16. The Kellys get on some gold.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Snow Blind
programme.desc: The clock ticks as an impending, violent arctic storm the Siberian Express gathers strength. Shawn can't quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie miner. Emily finds gold but her equipment fails. Vernon risks everything to test Claim 16.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Pain in the Ice
programme.desc: Following the arctic storm that drove everyone to shore, Shawn embarks on a marathon dive, Kris unveils a diving relay with The Reaper's new diver Shaunna, and Emily takes another desperate shot at TOMCOD gold.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Total Meltdown
programme.desc: Suffering the icy burn of possible defeat, Kris wrecks his 3-diver relay plan and abandons his crew. Shawn is forced to question TOMCOD. Emily returns home to Claim 14. Vernon gambles on the edge of the ice.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Cold Man and the Sea
programme.desc: The clock ticks as Shawn races to prove the viability of the TOMCOD. Kris makes amends with his crew and Brad dives for the first time in five years, saving the day with a surprise. Back on Claim 14, Emily tries to break her ice season curse.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Freezer Burn
programme.desc: When the temperature plummets to a season low, Shawn fights frozen ground with steam heat. Kris' hot plan to beat the cold fizzles quickly. Vernon gambles on a new spot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Up in Flames
programme.desc: As an arctic blizzard wreaks havoc across Nome, Kris finds gold under the ice but fire erupts overhead. Shawn struggles to rescue his operation. Emily risks it all on a double dive and Vernon leans on a diver making her comeback.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Do or Die
programme.desc: Recovering from COVID-19, Tammy now needs constant oxygen, and her weight spirals. Chris faces his final weigh-in, and Amy makes a big decision about her future. With Tammy's romance heating up, the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Destinee's Story
programme.desc: Born as 'Matthew', Destinee never felt like she fit in. Now, having come out as a 600-pound transgender woman, she likes her curves, but she will need to say goodbye to them if she wants to be approved to transition completely.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Angie J - Part 1- Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Right when Angie starts to succeed in Dr. Now's program, her marriage falls apart and her life is thrown into chaos. Angie moves ahead despite dire difficulties, but when her body starts to break down, Angie fears the worst ... and faces it alone.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Kenae's Journey
programme.desc: Kenae' was already big before her weight gain took off after the death of her beloved mother. Refusing to deal with the pain, Kenae' turned to food to fill the void. But she'll be reunited with her mom soon if the denial continues.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Angie J - Part 1- Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Right when Angie starts to succeed in Dr. Now's program, her marriage falls apart and her life is thrown into chaos. Angie moves ahead despite dire difficulties, but when her body starts to break down, Angie fears the worst ... and faces it alone.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Kenae's Journey
programme.desc: Kenae' was already big before her weight gain took off after the death of her beloved mother. Refusing to deal with the pain, Kenae' turned to food to fill the void. But she'll be reunited with her mom soon if the denial continues.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Being Strong or Being a Bitch
programme.desc: Janelle gathers Kody and the wives to talk about their increasingly tense family dynamic. Kody gets honest and says he doesn't want to advocate for polygamy anymore, and Robyn and Christine open up about their own insecurities as they question everything.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Felons No More
programme.desc: The Browns visit their polygamist friends to discuss the sudden and exciting possibility that polygamy will be decriminalized in Utah. The car trip to get there is a mess, but once there, the excitement is palpable.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Coronavirus Crisis
programme.desc: Coronavirus has hit the Waldrops hard. School and sports are on hold, and Courtney's parents can no longer provide much-needed help during the day. In addition, Eric stops construction on the remodel as the family faces an uncertain financial future.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Survival Mode
programme.desc: After years of renovations, the Waldrops finally move into their new home. School is starting for the boys, and fears of COVID-19 lead Courtney and Eric to consider homeschooling. They also decide to send the sextuplets to a speech pathologist.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: There's a Shark in the Salon!
programme.desc: It's sink or swim for Randy when Shark Tank's Barbara Corcoran comes to Kleinfeld. Bride Bridgette needs a dress she can run in. Her wedding ceremony is taking place during a half marathon in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm the Bride, Leave Some Space!
programme.desc: Nikki is looking for a fun, party-ready dress for her wild New Year's Eve wedding. Bride Natalie dreams of a finding a ball gown so massive that wedding guests will struggle to get close to her and someone could even 'hide' underneath it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Did I Hear Someone Say $16,000?
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That's How You Dress a Lady
programme.desc: Randy's runway show is finally here and it's his big opportunity to prove he's back as a bridal designer for good.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Seven People With Seven Opinions
programme.desc: Super fan TK brings seven of her closest friends to help her choose her dress. Actress Leslie has an unlimited budget, but she refuses to believe her opinionated mom chose the perfect wedding gown on the very first try.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: 14 and Looking for Mr. Right

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: All Bets Are Off

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Revenge of the Monster Wolf
programme.desc: Footage of a fearsome wolf-like creature in the remote wilderness of northern Canada could be evidence of a dire wolf, a prehistoric beast that went extinct at the end of the last Ice Age; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if it has returned.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Horror of Dead Man's Island
programme.desc: When a gigantic ship emerges from the sands of a strange island, experts investigate; what they find reveals evidence of a horrific Viking massacre.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Dragon's Fire
programme.desc: A dark object is captured flying among skyscrapers in China and an explosion engulfs the side of a high-rise in flames at the same moment; experts investigate this astonishing evidence of terrifying, dragon-like creatures.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Jobs
programme.desc: Meet people with the strangest jobs in the world.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Inventions
programme.desc: A man creates a robot duplicate of himself; 'pixie dust' can re-grow a lost limb; superhero transgenic spider-goat; a machine that makes cyborgs out of people.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Vehicles
programme.desc: Flying using only water power; an underwater car; a boat that is built to deliberately sink; a huge plane style boat that might revolutionize travel.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Explosions
programme.desc: Explore truly bizarre explosions including an unconventional summer camp for teens with a bombastic curriculum and haute couture fashion that could save your life.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Sleep
programme.desc: Go inside the astonishing science of the world's strangest places to sleep. In Sweden, visitors can stay at an invisible hotel. A couple has converted a relic of the cold war into a family home. And learn how to sleep in a pressurized tin can for 28 days.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Fell From the Sky
programme.desc: Revealing some of the strangest things that have fallen from the sky around the world.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Underground
programme.desc: Featuring the largest collection of mummies; the secret bunker below New York's Grand Central Terminal; hundreds of miles of tunnels that lie beneath Las Vegas; astronomers who look at the stars two miles underground.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Places
programme.desc: An American lake that swallows land and boats; a road in Scotland where gravity seems to be suspended and cars roll up hills; an island where tourists get their kicks surfing the jet streams of planes.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Family Lies
programme.desc: A reunited family begins to point fingers at each other when a house fire kills one of their own. And somewhere in the ashes are the clues to a murder.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: No End In Sight
programme.desc: Debbie Puglisi is enjoying life with her husband of nearly 25 years, Nino, in their new dream home. But when an unexpected visitor drops by the neighborhood, Debbie's whole world becomes her worst nightmare in a matter of minutes.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Can't Let Go
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Misty falls in love with a man nearly 15 years her senior, Misty's parents warn against the relationship. But no one could predict the danger Misty is in, or how this man will change all their lives forever.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Killer on the Roof
programme.desc: A former marine is gunned down in bed, and detectives believe the shots were fired from the roof outside his second-story window. When the investigators' focus turns to the victim's workplace, furious colleagues and scorned exes litter the suspect list.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bloodland
programme.desc: A young family buys a rural piece of paradise. Still, the gate on their land that prevents neighbours from accessing their property soon becomes an angry, ultimately fatal, bone of contention.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Said I Killed My Brother
programme.desc: Eric Nance expects his sister Belinda to find and destroy his murder weapon to protect him. When she finally locates it, Belinda is torn between family loyalty and doing what she knows is right. Her choice will either shield him from police or betray him.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Killer on the Roof
programme.desc: A former marine is gunned down in bed, and detectives believe the shots were fired from the roof outside his second-story window. When the investigators' focus turns to the victim's workplace, furious colleagues and scorned exes litter the suspect list.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bloodland
programme.desc: A young family buys a rural piece of paradise. Still, the gate on their land that prevents neighbours from accessing their property soon becomes an angry, ultimately fatal, bone of contention.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Wasn't Right
programme.desc: Beverly Stephens knew something wasn't right with her husband, Reginald Brooks, but never thought there was a killer inside him.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Salon Stalker
programme.desc: When Idaho hairdresser Makaela Zabel-Gravatt begins cutting the hair of truck driver Christopher Wirfs, little does she realize that it signals the start of a two-year long nightmare that will end in the most heart-stopping and disturbing way.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Pipe Nightmare
programme.desc: Barry Hornstein accidentally detonates a pipe bomb in his own driveway when he kicks a mysterious package. Suddenly, an online terror campaign against his 17-year old son ensues, leading police to wonder who wants to hurt the Hornsteins, and why?

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hate Mail
programme.desc: Shortly after Chris Coleman starts a new job as Security Chief for a Christian ministry, he begins receiving threatening emails. Then, tragedy strikes: his wife and two sons are found dead. Police must work to trace the emails back to the killer.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Grounds for Murder
programme.desc: Two women disappear from an elite college town. Panic pervades the community when their bodies are found.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Natalee Holloway: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: The daughter of a Peruvian political candidate disappears after a night out in Lima, Peru. The man she was last seen alive with is linked to the disappearance of young American woman 3,000 miles away.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: The Gentleman Killer
programme.desc: Bronx, NY, 1941: When tea for two becomes a murder of one, investigators from all across New York City must act upon the testimony of a few brave women to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Lock Up Your Daughters
programme.desc: Gaffney, SC, 1968: When a local reporter receives a mysterious phone call from a murderer who threatens to kill again, Gaffney police must race against the clock to try to save the town's teen girls.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Follow the Money
programme.desc: The body of a 72-year-old man is found in junkyard, stabbed 13 times and wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures. When investigators discover a trail of purchases made with the victim's credit card, they hope it will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Killer Clown?
programme.desc: A bizarre murder shocks a wealthy community when a person dressed like a clown guns down a woman at her front door. Suspicion falls on the victim's husband and his alleged girlfriend, but it would take over twenty years until an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Billy Frietag is a free-spirited young man who spends the warmer months working the family fruit and vegetable farm, and travels when it's cold. Tragically, it's his openness and generosity that lead to strange set of events which culminate in his death.

programme.title: Shattered: The Pact
programme.desc: In 1990, a teenage boy vanishes. Nearly two decades later, there's still no trace of him, dead or alive. It's a mother's worst nightmare, but one detective refuses to stop looking until he's able to solve this mystery.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Open 24 Hours
programme.desc: To pay for college, Donna Ferres takes a job working the overnight shift at a local convenience store. But after a familiar face walks into the store one night, her routine shift takes a sick and twisted turn.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Lies
programme.desc: In 2015, Detective Scott Sanderson finds himself solving one of the strangest cases of his career. At its center are a newborn and her missing mother. Before long he'll uncover a diabolical scheme that will destroy the lives of everyone it touches.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Death of Hitler
programme.desc: History tells us that Adolf Hitler committed suicide in his bunker in Berlin. However, some dissenting voices disagree.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel

programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
